name: secure-transparent-electronic-voting-system
description: A **secure, web-based electronic voting platform** designed to ensure fair elections through cryptographic security, robust access control, and complete auditability. The system models real-world election workflows, enabling **Voters**, **Election Officials**, and **Auditors** to participate in a transparent process while guaranteeing **vote anonymity** and **result integrity**.

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd ../backend-api && npm install && cd ../project-election-admin && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../project-voter && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../project-observer && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../project-sys-admin && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../project-voter-registration && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../project-reg-obs-app && npm install
scripts.dev:admin: npx concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run admin"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently "npm run backend" "npm run admin" "npm run voter" "npm run observer" "npm run sysadmin" "npm run registration" "npm run reg-obs"
scripts.build:all: cd ../project-election-admin && npm run build && cd ../project-voter && npm run build && cd ../project-observer && npm run build && cd ../project-sys-admin && npm run build && cd ../project-voter-registration && npm run build
